title: On-Call Handoff Notes
text:
## On-Call Handoff Notes

**Outgoing engineer:** {person}

**Pager mood:** {emotion}

**Watch item:** The {adjective} server in {place} has been {verb ending in -ing} since {number} PM.

**Known issue:** If the dashboard turns {color}, do not {verb}; restart the {object} {adverb}.

**Customer impact:** One {job} cannot upload {plural noun} and keeps sending {sound} messages.

**Snack inventory:** {food}, {food}, and a suspicious {adjective} cup.

**Final note:** Trust nothing after {day of week}.
